glosses.ja: つなぐ; 包帯を巻く

sentences.target: Ich will mein Handy mit dem WLAN verbinden.
sentences.reading: /ɪç vɪl maɪn ˈhɛndi mɪt deːm ˈveːlaːn fɛɐˈbɪndn̩/

translations.de: Ich will mein Handy mit dem WLAN verbinden.
translations.ipa: /ɪç vɪl maɪn ˈhɛndi mɪt deːm ˈveːlaːn fɛɐˈbɪndn̩/
translations.en: I want to connect my phone to the Wi-Fi.
translations.es: Quiero conectar mi teléfono al Wi-Fi.
translations.fr: Je veux connecter mon téléphone au Wi-Fi.
translations.it: Voglio collegare il telefono al Wi-Fi.
translations.ru: Я хочу подключить телефон к Wi‑Fi.
translations.pt: Quero conectar meu celular ao Wi‑Fi.
translations.he: אני רוצה לחבר את הטלפון שלי ל-Wi-Fi.
translations.vi: Tôi muốn kết nối điện thoại của mình với Wi-Fi.
translations.ar: أريد توصيل هاتفي بشبكة الواي فاي.
translations.nl: Ik wil mijn telefoon met het wifi-netwerk verbinden.
translations.uk: Я хочу підключити телефон до Wi‑Fi.
translations.hu: A telefonomat szeretném csatlakoztatni a Wi-Fi-hez.
translations.hi: मुझे अपना फोन वाई-फाई से जोड़ना है.
translations.el: Θέλω να συνδέσω το κινητό μου στο Wi-Fi.
translations.nb: Jeg vil koble telefonen min til Wi-Fi.
translations.id: Saya ingin menyambungkan ponsel saya ke Wi‑Fi.
translations.sv: Jag vill ansluta mobilen till wifi.
translations.ro: Vreau să conectez telefonul la Wi‑Fi.
translations.da: Jeg vil forbinde min telefon til wi-fi.
translations.ja: スマホをWi‑Fiに接続したいです。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; subject of the modal auxiliary 'will'.
Modal auxiliary, present tense, 1st person singular; selects the bare infinitive 'verbinden'.
Possessive determiner modifying 'Handy'; neuter singular form; part of the accusative object of 'verbinden'.
Common noun, neuter singular; head of the NP functioning as the direct object of 'verbinden'.
Preposition governing the dative; introduces a PP indicating the medium/instrument.
Definite article, dative singular; marks case for 'WLAN' after 'mit'.
Common noun, neuter; object of the preposition 'mit' (dative).
Lexical verb in bare infinitive; complement of the modal 'will'.

sentences.target: Der Arzt muss meinen Arm verbinden.

translations.de: Der Arzt muss meinen Arm verbinden.
translations.en: The doctor has to bandage my arm.
translations.es: El médico tiene que vendarme el brazo.
translations.fr: Le médecin doit me bander le bras.
translations.it: Il dottore deve fasciarmi il braccio.
translations.ko: 의사가 내 팔에 붕대를 감아야 해요.
translations.yue: 醫生要幫我包紮隻手臂。
translations.pt: O médico precisa enfaixar meu braço.
translations.he: הרופא צריך לחבוש לי את היד.
translations.vi: Bác sĩ phải băng bó cánh tay cho tôi.
translations.nl: De arts moet mijn arm verbinden.
translations.hu: Az orvosnak be kell kötöznie a karomat.
translations.hi: डॉक्टर को मेरे हाथ पर पट्टी बाँधनी है.
translations.el: Ο γιατρός πρέπει να μου δέσει το χέρι.
translations.sv: Läkaren måste lägga bandage på min arm.
translations.ja: 医者は私の腕に包帯を巻かなければなりません。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative singular masculine; modifies 'Arzt'.
Common noun, masculine singular; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary, present tense, 3rd person singular; selects the bare infinitive 'verbinden'.
Possessive determiner, accusative singular masculine form; modifies 'Arm'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'verbinden'.
Lexical verb in bare infinitive; complement of the modal 'muss'; here used in the medical sense 'to bandage'.

translations.yue: 你可以將啲線接埋一齊。
translations.vi: Bạn có thể nối các dây lại với nhau.
translations.hi: तुम केबलों को जोड़ सकते हो.
translations.ja: ケーブルをつなげるよ。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular, nominative; subject of 'kannst'.
Modal auxiliary, present tense, 2nd person singular; selects the bare infinitive 'verbinden'.
Definite article, accusative plural; modifies 'Kabel'.
Common noun, plural; head of the NP functioning as the direct object of 'verbinden'.
Lexical verb in bare infinitive; complement of the modal 'kannst'.

sentences.target: Die Sekretärin will dich mit Maria verbinden.
sentences.reading: /diː zekʁeˈtɛːʁɪn vɪl dɪç mɪt maˈʁiːa fɛɐˈbɪndn̩/

translations.de: Die Sekretärin will dich mit Maria verbinden.
translations.ipa: /diː zekʁeˈtɛːʁɪn vɪl dɪç mɪt maˈʁiːa fɛɐˈbɪndn̩/
translations.en: The secretary wants to put you through to Maria.
translations.es: La secretaria quiere pasarte con María.
translations.fr: La secrétaire veut te passer Maria.
translations.ko: 비서가 당신을 마리아에게 연결해 주려 해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 秘书想把你的电话转接给玛丽亚。
translations.yue: 秘書想幫你轉駁畀瑪麗亞。
translations.ru: Секретарь хочет соединить тебя с Марией.
translations.pt: A secretária quer te passar para a Maria.
translations.vi: Thư ký muốn nối máy cho bạn gặp Maria.
translations.nl: De secretaresse wil je doorverbinden met Maria.
translations.uk: Секретарка хоче з'єднати тебе з Марією.
translations.hu: A titkárnő át akar kapcsolni Mariához.
translations.hi: सचिव आपको मारिया से जोड़ना चाहती है.
translations.pl: Sekretarka chce cię połączyć z Marią.
translations.el: Η γραμματέας θέλει να σε συνδέσει με τη Μαρία.
translations.nb: Sekretæren vil sette deg over til Maria.
translations.id: Sekretaris ingin menyambungkan kamu ke Maria.
translations.sv: Sekreteraren vill koppla dig vidare till Maria.
translations.ro: Secretara vrea să te transfere la Maria.
translations.cs: Sekretářka tě chce přepojit k Marii.
translations.da: Sekretæren vil sætte dig igennem til Maria.
translations.ja: 秘書はあなたをマリアにつなぎたがっています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative singular feminine; modifies 'Sekretärin'.
Common noun, feminine singular; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary, present tense, 3rd person singular; selects the bare infinitive 'verbinden'.
Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular, accusative; direct object of 'verbinden'.
Preposition governing the dative; introduces a comitative PP.
Proper noun; object of the preposition 'mit' (dative).
Lexical verb in bare infinitive; complement of the modal 'will'; here used in the sense of connecting someone (e.g., on the phone).
